analysis.name: Tensor
analysis.summary: TNSR近期因Solana NFT市场回暖及项目基本面改善而大幅上涨，但市值低、流动性差，且距离历史高点跌幅超98%，风险较高。

recommendation.invalidation: 若价格跌破0.03美元或成交量萎缩，则逻辑失效

catalysts: Solana NFT市场回暖，Tensor作为头部NFT交易平台受益
Vector社交交易应用快速增长，年化交易量达75亿美元，为TNSR国库贡献费用
近期价格突破下行趋势线，技术面看涨

latestNews.reason: 显示市场关注度提升，但涨幅过大可能已透支

latestNews.title: Tensor (TNSR) Surge: Solana’s NFT Trader Hub Breaks Out in Style
latestNews.reason: 技术面突破，吸引交易者

latestNews.title: Tensor TNSR Price Surges 152% as Solana NFT Rally Brews
latestNews.reason: Solana NFT板块整体上涨带动

fundamentals: Tensor是Solana上领先的NFT交易平台，市场份额60-70%
Vector社交交易应用年化交易量75亿美元，日活2万，增长迅速
TNSR代币总供应量10亿，流通约3.35亿，流通市值约1138万美元，FDV约3400万美元
marketRead: 成交量2308万美元，相对市值较大，显示投机活跃
价格从ATH 2.23美元跌至0.035美元，跌幅98.5%，处于极低位
risks: 代币全流通，无解锁压力，但市值极低，易被操纵
新闻热度高但可能已price in，追高风险大
Solana NFT市场可持续性存疑，若降温则TNSR承压
Binance数据不可用，流动性数据缺失
watchlist: TNSR价格能否站稳0.035美元上方
是否有新合作或产品更新
sourceNotes: Binance数据因地区限制无法获取，价格数据来自CoinMarketCap
新闻日期为2025年11月，可能已过时，但近期无更新

profile.name: Tensor
profile.description: The TNSR token governs the protocols underlying Tensor and Vector. 50% of protocol fees from both products accrue to the TNSR treasury. Tensor launched in July 2022 and is the leading NFT marketplace on Solana, commanding 60-70% of Solana NFT market share. It gained momentum by catering to NFTs traders instead of just collectors with real-time data, pro charting tools, and a fast terminal interface. Vector is the leading social trading app in crypto. Within 3 months of launch, it grew to $7.5 billion of annualized volume and 20k daily active users, both of which are doubling every 1-2 weeks. It generates $75M/year in fees of which 50% goes directly to the TNSR treasury.
